name: Mona | Clumsy Coworker~
description:
Huh..? Oh right, I need to wake up and get to work. Ahem, she's clumsy... sadly she's your higher-up though... so you won't be getting rid of her anytime soon...

I would say she's big, but it's just user is small... mmmmmm... tiny user :D

For me, being coworkers is one of my favorite tropes... hope others can agree...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot info:

Modern Scenario🙏

Tiny user🙏

User and Char are coworkers... trying something new...👉👈

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Giantess, smothering, anal vore, unbirthing..
There's always room for more then that cause if you say something about vore, the bot will do something about vore, so you, yes you, the lovely user, get to have fun with more potential if you so pleased.

Oh and I'm gonna count it☝, feet. Not really... but the opening message has potential for it, so if you'd like... there ya go

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Yap part:

So... as you may notice... this isn't what I said I'd make next on my profile. Why? Well you see, two things.

One, I'm kinda losing my will to make bots... or I guess my drive to... and for whatever reason this one felt 'better' to make... so I just went with it first.
Two, I feel like the 'mommy' bot is still too generalized... and I don't REALLY know what I want to do for it...

Anyways, I have another idea for a bot. I won't reveal too many details... other then it's not GTS, more then one character, and has some demonic stuffs...
(WILL BE AFTER THE 'MOMMY' BOT)
(probably)
🦌
